Auditor-Workflow.title: Auditor Workflow
Auditor-Workflow.content:
Auditor Workflow
Auditors do not create controls.
They gather evidence demonstrating that a control was executed.
Typical workflow:
Control
→ Request Evidence
→ Receive Artifacts
→ Validate Completeness
→ Execute Testing
→ Reach Conclusion
Evidence is commonly obtained from:

SAP
ServiceNow
Jira
SharePoint
Outlook
Excel trackers
Internal reporting systems

Related

Evidence Gatherer
Evidence Characteristics

auditor
#workflow

Classification-Decision-Rules.title: Classification Decision Rules
Classification-Decision-Rules.content:
Classification Decision Rules
The agent should classify evidence before selecting methodology.
Rules:
SAP Screenshot
→ IPE SAP Image Validation
Image Containing Tables
→ ROW_LEVEL_ANALYSIS
Excel Workbook
→ ROW_LEVEL_ANALYSIS
Email Approval
→ CPT Methodology
PDF Report
→ Text Extraction
Goal
Enable autonomous methodology selection.

Evidence-Characteristics.title: Evidence Characteristics
Evidence-Characteristics.content:
Evidence Characteristics
Evidence is the primary driver of methodology selection.
The nature of the evidence determines:

Which tools should be invoked
Which validation methodology should be selected
Which outputs can be trusted

Email Evidence
SAP Screenshot Evidence

Tabular Evidence
